title: Matrices
description: Learn matrix operations, determinants, inverses, and how to solve systems of linear equations using matrices.

contentBlocks.text:
A matrix is a rectangular array of numbers arranged in rows and columns. For example, a $2 \times 2$ matrix $A$ is: 

$$A = \begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix}$$
The determinant of a $2 \times 2$ matrix $A$ is $|A| = ad - bc$.
